action.reasoning: Observation: Iter 12 achieved macro_f1=0.0799 (significantly improved from 0.0099) using CLIP ViT-B/16 fine-tuned for 3 epochs. Analysis: The linear classifier head on top of frozen features may be suboptimal for long-tailed classification. A stronger head (MLP with class weights) trained on frozen features can boost macro_f1, and this can be done quickly within remaining 1.1h. Decision: Extract features from the trained model, train a 2-layer MLP head with class weights, label smoothing, and feature-space mixup, replace classifier in checkpoint, and submit eval.
